pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 34 (POSTGRES_PASSWORD environment variable) and export_result.sh line 10 (DB_PASS variable)
task.json description specifies this as the required replication user to be created by the agent
task.json description specifies this as the required replication password to be created by the agent
export_result.sh line 44 shows CANARY_TOKEN="CANARY_$(date +%s)" - the actual prefix used is CANARY_ not VERIFICATION_CANARY_

privileged_info_summary: The task uses PostgreSQL 15 on Alpine Linux running in Docker Compose 3.8. The database is initialized with a postgres user and password 'password123'. The task requires creating a replication user named 'repl_user' with password 'repl_password'. The setup script creates a project directory at /home/ga/projects/db-cluster with seed data containing 5 product entries (Gaming Laptop, Wireless Mouse, Mechanical Keyboard, Monitor 27-inch, USB-C Hub). The verification script uses canary tokens with prefix 'CANARY_' (not 'VERIFICATION_CANARY_') followed by a timestamp to verify real-time replication. Two named Docker volumes are used: db-primary-data and db-replica-data for persistence.
